items.summary: In the OrbitDock component (frontend/src/components/OrbitDock.tsx), remove any logic that automatically opens/activates a function when a swipe gesture lands an item in the center position. Swiping must only update the visual active state (the centered item) without triggering navigation or opening any view.

In OrbitDock, implement open-on-tap logic: a function (Upload, Folders, Mission) opens only when (a) its icon is already in the center/active position AND (b) the user taps that centered icon. A tap on the centered icon must fire the appropriate navigation/open callback.

In OrbitDock, implement rotation-first behavior for side (inactive) icon taps: when the user taps an icon that is NOT currently centered, the dock smoothly rotates to bring that icon to the center (active state), but does NOT open the function. A second tap on the now-centered icon is required to open it.

Add subtle tap visual and haptic feedback to all OrbitDock icon interactions: on every tap (whether on the centered icon or a side icon), the tapped icon scales down to 0.95 for 100–120ms before returning to its normal scale. Additionally, trigger a light haptic vibration (using navigator.vibrate([10]) or equivalent) if the browser/device supports it.
